summary: Primary workbook sequence for teaching, practice, and reflection inside one authored section.
renderingRules: Render learn content in authored cards before any practice interaction.
Place practice directly after the teaching it checks.
End the sequence with reflection or readiness writing.
interactionRules: Practice blocks may use inline checking, matching, sorting, or scenario choice patterns.
Reflection should support persisted learner writing.
persistenceRules: Persist learner responses for reflection fields and practice inputs when save keys are provided.
constraints: Do not separate practice into a different tab from the teaching it supports.
Do not show source support by default inside the core lesson flow.
